anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.merge_dim_comm
anchors.type: merge_dim_comm : forall a b : dim_usage, merge_dim_usage a b = merge_dim_usage b a

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.merge_dim_assoc
anchors.type: merge_dim_assoc : forall a b c : dim_usage, merge_dim_usage a (merge_dim_usage b c) = merge_dim_usage (merge_dim_usage a b) c

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.merge_dim_idempotent
anchors.type: merge_dim_idempotent : forall a : dim_usage, merge_dim_usage a a = a

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.merge_dim_empty_r
anchors.type: merge_dim_empty_r : forall a : dim_usage, merge_dim_usage a empty_dim_usage = a

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.merge_dim_empty_l
anchors.type: merge_dim_empty_l : forall a : dim_usage, merge_dim_usage empty_dim_usage a = a

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.check_seq_hom
anchors.type: check_seq_hom : forall (m : exec_mode) (es1 es2 : list expr), check m (ESeq (es1 ++ es2)) = (check m (ESeq es1) ++ check m (ESeq es2))%list

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.diverged_clean_iff_barrier_free
anchors.type: diverged_clean_iff_barrier_free : forall e : expr, check Diverged e = nil <-> barrier_free e = true

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.mode_monotone
anchors.type: mode_monotone : forall e : expr, List.incl (check Converged e) (check Diverged e)

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.not_varying_converged_clean
anchors.type: not_varying_converged_clean : forall e : expr, is_varying e = false -> check Converged e = nil

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.cdcf_check_agreement
anchors.type: cdcf_check_agreement : forall e : expr, has_diverging_cf e = false -> check Converged e = nil

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.varying_if_flags_barriers
anchors.type: varying_if_flags_barriers : forall (cond then_ else_ : expr) (ctx : exec_mode), is_varying cond = true -> barrier_free then_ = false -> check ctx (EIf cond then_ else_) <> nil

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.superstep_outer_diverged_error
anchors.type: superstep_outer_diverged_error : forall body cont : expr, check Diverged (ESuperstep false body cont) <> nil

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.env_lookup_extend_same
anchors.type: env_lookup_extend_same : forall (env : Env) (x : nat) (v : bool), env_lookup (env_extend env x v) x = v

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.env_let_alias_varying
anchors.type: env_let_alias_varying : forall (env : Env) (x : nat) (v b : expr), is_varying_in_env env v = true -> is_varying_in_env (env_extend env x true) b = true -> is_varying_in_env env (ELet x v b) = true

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.env_var_diverged_clean
anchors.type: env_var_diverged_clean : forall (env : Env) (x : nat), check_env Diverged env (EVar x) = nil

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.env_check_let_alias_catches
anchors.type: env_check_let_alias_catches : forall (env : Env) (x : nat) (v : expr), is_varying_in_env env v = true -> check_env Converged env (ELet x v (EIf (EVar x) EBarrier ELit)) <> nil

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.warp_diverged_error
anchors.type: warp_diverged_error : check_warp Diverged EWarpPoint <> nil

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.warp_mode_monotone
anchors.type: warp_mode_monotone : forall e : expr, List.incl (check_warp Converged e) (check_warp Diverged e)

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.warp_varying_if_flags
anchors.type: warp_varying_if_flags : forall el : expr, check_warp Converged (EIf EVary EWarpPoint el) <> nil

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSpec.return_barrier_skip_safe
anchors.type: return_barrier_skip_safe : forall (m : exec_mode) (e : expr), check m (EReturn e) = check m e

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.env_agrees
anchors.notes: Uniform-variable agreement predicate between two venvs: all non-varying vars in env map to the same value in both rhos

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.not_varying_uniform
anchors.type: not_varying_uniform : forall (vary_val : tid -> value) (fuel : nat) (env : Env) (e : expr) (t1 t2 : tid) (rho1 rho2 : venv), env_agrees env rho1 rho2 = true -> is_strongly_uniform env e = true -> eval vary_val fuel t1 rho1 e = eval vary_val fuel t2 rho2 e

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.not_varying_uniform_args
anchors.type: not_varying_uniform_args : forall (vary_val : tid -> value) (fuel : nat) (env : Env) (es : list expr) (t1 t2 : tid) (rho1 rho2 : venv), env_agrees env rho1 rho2 = true -> forallb (is_strongly_uniform env) es = true -> eval_args vary_val fuel t1 rho1 es = eval_args vary_val fuel t2 rho2 es

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.is_strongly_uniform_impl_is_not_varying
anchors.type: is_strongly_uniform_impl_is_not_varying : forall (env : Env) (e : expr), is_strongly_uniform env e = true -> is_varying_in_env env e = false

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.var_free_env_irrelevant
anchors.type: var_free_env_irrelevant : forall (e : expr) (env1 env2 : Env), is_var_free e = true -> is_strongly_uniform env1 e = is_strongly_uniform env2 e

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.is_strongly_uniform_env_irrelevant
anchors.type: is_strongly_uniform_env_irrelevant : forall (e : expr) (env1 env2 : Env), is_var_free e = true -> is_strongly_uniform env1 e = is_strongly_uniform env2 e
anchors.notes: Alias name for var_free_env_irrelevant in some proof contexts

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.var_free_is_strongly_uniform_empty
anchors.type: var_free_is_strongly_uniform_empty : forall (e : expr), is_var_free e = true -> is_varying e = false -> is_strongly_uniform [] e = true

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.closed_uniform
anchors.type: closed_uniform : forall (e : expr) (vary_val : tid -> value) (fuel : nat) (t1 t2 : tid) (rho1 rho2 : venv), is_var_free e = true -> is_varying e = false -> eval vary_val fuel t1 rho1 e = eval vary_val fuel t2 rho2 e

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.no_barrier_event
anchors.notes: Boolean predicate on a trace: true iff the trace contains no EvBarrier event

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.superstep_free
anchors.notes: Structural Boolean predicate on expr: true iff e contains no ESuperstep constructor

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.eval_seq_from
anchors.notes: Helper definition/fixpoint for ESeq inner loop used in eval_seq_no_barrier

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.eval_args_from
anchors.notes: Helper definition/fixpoint for EApp inner loop used in eval_args_no_barrier

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.no_barrier_app
anchors.type: no_barrier_app : forall (tr1 tr2 : trace), no_barrier_event tr1 = true -> no_barrier_event tr2 = true -> no_barrier_event (tr1 ++ tr2) = true

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.for_loop_fixed_no_barrier
anchors.type: for_loop_fixed_no_barrier : EFor inner loop helper — no EvBarrier in loop traces when body is barrier_free and superstep_free

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.eval_seq_no_barrier
anchors.type: eval_seq_no_barrier : ESeq inner loop helper — no EvBarrier in concatenated traces when each element is barrier_free and superstep_free

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.eval_args_no_barrier
anchors.type: eval_args_no_barrier : EApp inner loop helper — no EvBarrier in argument traces when each argument is barrier_free and superstep_free

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.barrier_free_no_barriers
anchors.type: barrier_free_no_barriers : forall (vary_val : tid -> value) (fuel : nat) (t : tid) (rho : venv) (e : expr) (o : outcome) (tr : trace), barrier_free e = true -> superstep_free e = true -> eval vary_val fuel t rho e = Some (o, tr) -> no_barrier_event tr = true

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.diverged_clean_no_barriers
anchors.type: diverged_clean_no_barriers : forall (vary_val : tid -> value) (fuel : nat) (t : tid) (rho : venv) (e : expr) (o : outcome) (tr : trace), check Diverged e = nil -> superstep_free e = true -> eval vary_val fuel t rho e = Some (o, tr) -> no_barrier_event tr = true
anchors.notes: Corollary of barrier_free_no_barriers via diverged_clean_iff_barrier_free; the T1 flagship theorem acquires semantic content

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.core_frag
anchors.notes: Fixpoint Boolean predicate on expr: true iff e contains no ESuperstep and no EReturn (the fragment on which check_env_sound_core is first proved)

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.eval_check_uniform
anchors.type: eval_check_uniform : forall (vary_val : tid -> value) (fuel : nat), (Part A) forall env e t1 t2 rho1 rho2 o1 o2 tr1 tr2, core_frag e = true -> env_agrees env rho1 rho2 -> check_env Converged env e = [] -> eval vary_val fuel t1 rho1 e = Some (o1, tr1) -> eval vary_val fuel t2 rho2 e = Some (o2, tr2) -> erase_warp tr1 = erase_warp tr2 /\ (Part B) forall env e t1 t2 rho1 rho2 o1 o2 tr1 tr2, core_frag e = true -> env_agrees env rho1 rho2 -> is_varying_in_env env e = false -> check_env Converged env e = [] -> eval vary_val fuel t1 rho1 e = Some (o1, tr1) -> eval vary_val fuel t2 rho2 e = Some (o2, tr2) -> o1 = o2
anchors.notes: Combined induction on fuel establishing Part A (barrier-trace equality) and Part B (outcome equality for non-varying expressions); simultaneous proof needed because EIf/EWhile non-varying cases of Part A depend on Part B for condition equality

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.check_env_nonvarying_uniform
anchors.type: check_env_nonvarying_uniform_seq / check_env_nonvarying_uniform_args : auxiliary lemmas that when check_env Converged env es = [] and all elements are non-varying and core_frag, the eval_seq / eval_args loops are identical for any two env-agreeing threads
anchors.notes: Corollary group bridging the non-varying condition uniformity into the sequence/application inner loops used by eval_check_uniform

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.check_env_sound_core
anchors.type: check_env_sound_core : forall (vary_val : tid -> value) (env : Env) (e : expr), core_frag e = true -> check_env Converged env e = [] -> barrier_safe vary_val env e
anchors.notes: Main T3-S4 theorem: checker soundness for the core fragment; proved as a one-liner via proj1 (eval_check_uniform vary_val fuel)

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.hazard
anchors.notes: F-04 hazard term: ESeq [EIf EVary (EReturn ELit) ELit; EBarrier] — thread-varying early return guarding a later barrier

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.hazard_vary
anchors.notes: Concrete thread-varying witness for F-04: vary_val 0 = 1 (early return), vary_val (S _) = 0 (fall through to barrier)

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.hazard_checker_blind
anchors.type: hazard_checker_blind : check_env Converged [] hazard = []
anchors.notes: F-04: the static checker reports no error on hazard (by reflexivity) — EReturn transparency + Converged-mode EBarrier cleanliness

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.hazard_eval_thread0
anchors.type: hazard_eval_thread0 : eval hazard_vary 6 0 [] hazard = Some (ORet 0, [])
anchors.notes: F-04 witness thread 0: takes the early return, barrier never reached, empty trace (by reflexivity)

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.hazard_eval_thread1
anchors.type: hazard_eval_thread1 : eval hazard_vary 6 1 [] hazard = Some (ONorm 0, [EvBarrier])
anchors.notes: F-04 witness thread 1: falls through to the barrier, trace [EvBarrier] (by reflexivity)

anchors.name: ConvergenceSpec.ConvergenceSemantics.hazard_not_barrier_safe
anchors.type: hazard_not_barrier_safe : ~ barrier_safe hazard_vary [] hazard
anchors.notes: F-04 main theorem: constructive counterexample to barrier safety that check_env accepts (hazard_checker_blind). Threads 0/1 env-agree yet erase_warp traces [] vs [EvBarrier] differ. This is the boundary case excluded by the core_frag precondition of check_env_sound_core (EReturn transparency is a kernel-granularity false negative)
